name: Rice and Beans Cubano
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the rice separately and set aside.
2. In a large skillet, sauté the chopped green pepper and crushed garlic in olive oil until they are softened.
3. Add the remaining ingredients (black beans, oregano, vinegar, and pimientos) to the skillet.
4. Cover and simmer over low heat until heated through.
5. Taste and adjust seasoning as needed.
6. Serve the mixture over the cooked rice.
